description: An office manager needs to be reimbursed for the petty cash they spent during the month.

nodes.task_description: Receive the petty cash reimbursement request and all supporting receipts from the office manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the request form and receipts.

nodes.task_description: Review the receipts and ensure they are for valid business expenses.
Create a journal entry to record the expenses, debiting the various expense accounts (e.g., office supplies, postage) and crediting 'Cash'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the journal entry to record the expenses.

nodes.task_description: Issue a check to the office manager to replenish the petty cash fund.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes a check to bring the fund back to its original amount.
